2605.17355.title: HyperPersona: A Multi-Level Hypergraph Framework for Text-Based Automatic Personality Prediction
2605.17355.paper_summary: As a modern commodity, language has become a vast repository of socially and psychologically significant traits and concepts, reflecting the ways people encode pattern of thoughts, behaviors, and emotions into words. Text-based Automatic Personality Prediction (APP), seeks to infer personality from linguistic behavior, offering a scalable alternative to traditional psychometric assessments. Although text is inherently hierarchical, with the document-level capturing global features, the sentence-level encoding local semantics, and the word-level providing fine-grained lexical information, most existing approaches rely on shallow, sequential, or single-level representations that ignore the multi-level structure of written language. To address this, we propose HyperPersona, a framework that explicitly models the hierarchical organization of text (document, sentence, and word) through hypergraph structure, where a document and its sentences are represented as hyperedges, and the words are represented as nodes, enabling joint modeling of global, local, and lexical dependencies of text. Followed by a transformer-based graph encoder that learns interactions within and across these linguistic layers, yielding context-sensitive and structurally grounded feature representations for personality prediction. Experiments on the Big Five personality dimensions show that, while relying solely on text, HyperPersona effectively integrates multi-level linguistic cues, achieving superior performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines. These findings underscore the critical role of textual hierarchy in advancing human-like personality inference from natural language.
2605.17355.paper_summary_zh: 作為一種現代商品，語言已成為一個龐大的社會和心理意義特徵及概念的庫，反映了人們將思想、行為和情感模式編碼為文字的方式。基於文本的自動人格預測（APP）旨在從語言行為中推斷人格，提供一種可擴展的替代方案來取代傳統的心理測量評估。儘管文本本質上是分層的，文件層級捕捉全局特徵，句子層級編碼局部語義，而詞彙層級提供細緻的詞彙信息，但大多數現有方法依賴於淺層、順序或單層表示，忽略了書面語言的多層結構。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了HyperPersona，一個通過超圖結構明確建模文本的分層組織（文件、句子和詞彙）的框架，其中文件及其句子被表示為超邊，詞彙則被表示為節點，從而實現文本的全局、局部和詞彙依賴的聯合建模。隨後使用基於Transformer的圖編碼器學習這些語言層級內部及跨層級的交互，產生上下文敏感且結構化的特徵表示以進行人格預測。在五大人格維度的實驗中顯示，僅依賴文本，HyperPersona有效整合多層次的語言線索，達到優於最先進基準的卓越表現。這些發現強調了文本層次在從自然語言推進類人人格推斷中的關鍵作用。
2605.17355.author: Sina Heydari et.al.
